Quality Education.reason: The course is for Master's/Doctoral students (tertiary education, Target 4.3) and develops core mathematical, logical, and problem-solving skills essential for employment (Target 4.4).

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course develops advanced mathematical modeling and scientific computing skills, contributing to technological upgrading and higher economic productivity (Target 8.2).

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course's focus on advanced mathematics, scientific computing, and independent research directly enhances scientific research and innovation, upgrading technological capabilities (Target 9.5).
